components.name: LT-50 Probe Engine
components.description: A light kerolox kick motor for probes and upper stages.

components.name: RD-180 Booster
components.description: High-thrust kerolox first-stage engine; cluster for heavy lift.

components.name: Merlin 1D
components.description: Compact kerolox engine — clusters cleanly for a sustainer stage.

components.name: J-2 Upper
components.description: Hydrolox upper-stage engine with strong vacuum Isp.

components.name: RL-10 Vacuum
components.description: Efficient hydrolox vacuum engine for transfer and injection burns.

components.name: SPS Transfer Engine
components.description: Storable hypergolic engine — restartable for long coasts and capture.

components.name: LMDE Descent Engine
components.description: Throttleable hypergolic descent engine for landers.

components.name: F-1 Booster
components.description: Enormous kerolox first-stage engine — the heavy-lift workhorse.

components.name: NERVA NTR
components.description: Nuclear-thermal engine: very high Isp on liquid-hydrogen (hydrolox tanks).

components.name: S-25 Solid Booster
components.description: Strap-on solid motor — huge liftoff thrust, pair with a solid casing.

components.name: FT-1000 Tank
components.description: Small kerolox tank.

components.name: FT-500 Tank
components.description: Tiny kerolox tank for trim and probes.

components.name: FT-4000 Tank
components.description: Mid kerolox tank — the staple booster propellant unit.

components.name: FT-9000 Tank
components.description: Large kerolox tank for heavy first stages.

components.name: HT-2000 Tank
components.description: Mid hydrolox tank for upper stages.

components.name: HT-8000 Tank
components.description: Large hydrolox tank for NTR and high-energy stages.

components.name: PT-1500 Tank
components.description: Storable hypergolic propellant tank for service and landing stages.

components.name: Solid Casing
components.description: Cast solid-propellant casing — feeds a solid booster, cannot be drained early.

components.name: FT-100k Bulk Tank
components.description: Bulk kerolox tank for heavy first stages — one unit replaces a stack of FT-9000s.

components.name: HT-25k Bulk Tank
components.description: Bulk hydrolox tank for high-energy sustainer and transfer stages.

components.name: OKTO Probe Core
components.description: Uncrewed guidance core — commandable only with a comms link.

components.name: Mk1 Capsule
components.description: One-seat crew capsule with a recovery parachute.

components.name: Lander Can
components.description: Crewed lander cabin rated for powered soft landings.

components.name: DA-5 Direct Antenna
components.description: Short-range direct antenna — reaches the network but cannot relay.

components.name: RA-15 Relay
components.description: Relay antenna — uses the network and forwards for other vessels.

components.name: DSN-88 Deep-Space Dish
components.description: Deep-space direct dish for interplanetary range.

components.name: TR-2 Stack Adapter
components.description: Inert adapter joining stages of different diameters.

components.name: Aero Fairing
components.description: Protective payload fairing (inert mass).

components.name: Ballast Plate
components.description: Dead-weight ballast for trimming a stack's balance.
